rulings.Case Title: HARRY LEMASTER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 10:45 a.m., Line 3. PLAINTIFFS HARRY LEMASTER, CAROLYN LEMASTER, CAROLYN LEMASTER, SEAN LEMASTER, BARRY LEMASTER, KEVIN LEMASTER'S Motion To Compel Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition; And Request For Sanctions. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Metalclad Insulation Corp. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant must make Mr. Trueblood or another designated PMK available for a deposition on or before September 9, 2011. The hearing on this motion will be at 10:45am, not 9am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc. To Provide Further Responses To Asbestos General Order No. 129 Plaintiffs Standard Interrogatories To Defendants, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 10:45 a.m., Line 2. PLAINTIFF Waters Kraus & Paul¿s motion to compel defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc. to provide further responses to General Order No. 129 plaintiffs¿ standard interrogatories to defendants, and request for sanctions was continued for compliance hearing, which is itself continued to June 30 per the parties¿ agreement. = (220/HEK)
